things.name: Port Harcourt Pleasure Park
things.description: Riverside amusement park with gardens and the largest Ferris wheel in Nigeria

things.name: Isaac Boro Garden Park
things.description: Botanical garden and recreation area named after the Niger Delta activist

things.name: Bonny Island Excursion
things.description: Historic slave trade island with colonial-era buildings in the Niger Delta

things.name: Trans Amadi Area & Oil Industry
things.description: Hub of Nigeria's oil industry - driving through the industrial heart of African oil

things.name: Opobo Town Day Trip
things.description: Historic town founded by King Ja Ja - one of Nigeria's greatest trade empire builders

things.name: Port Harcourt Zoo
things.description: Zoo with West African wildlife including pygmy hippos

things.name: Rivers State Museum
things.description: Ijaw, Ogoni and Ikwerre culture of the Niger Delta peoples

things.name: Rumuola & GRA Market
things.description: City markets with fresh Niger Delta produce and street food

things.name: Live Music at Port Harcourt
things.description: The Niger Delta has a rich music tradition - highlife and Afrobeats bars

things.name: Bole and Fish
things.description: Port Harcourt's definitive street food - grilled plantain with smoked fish and pepper sauce
